translation_findings.issue: Released markdown answer line has DUPLICATE choice marker: 'A. a. Cash Cow'. The choices array was correctly normalized to A/B/C/D, but the export-time answer-text composer concatenated the legacy lowercase marker 'a.' from the pre-normalization choice text. Result reaches output/pages/*.md — release-impacting.
translation_findings.recommended_fix: In the markdown exporter, normalize the answer-text exactly like the choice text (strip any leading [A-Da-d甲-丁ア-エ][\.．、]\s* before prepending the canonical 'A. ' prefix). Re-render all output/pages/*.md; verify with grep -nE '\*\*Answer\*\*: [A-D]\. [a-d]\.'.

translation_findings.jp: イ. 自社の商品価格
translation_findings.zh: B. 本公司的商品价格
translation_findings.en: > **Answer**: B. b. Product prices of one's own company
translation_findings.issue: Same duplicate-marker bug ('B. b. …') as above; reaches released markdown. Same root cause and same fix.
translation_findings.recommended_fix: Same exporter normalization (see q::0 fix); covers all 4 questions on this page and 10+ other pages (042, 064, 125, 155, 182, 203, 205, 259, 261, …) confirmed by `grep -lnE '\*\*Answer\*\*: [A-D]\. [a-d]\.' output/pages/*.md`.

translation_findings.jp: ウ. ターゲットとしている市場の伸び / エ. 日本経済の動向
translation_findings.zh: 丙. 目标市场的增长 / 丁. 日本经济的动向
translation_findings.en: C. Growth of the target market / D. Trends in the Japanese economy
translation_findings.issue: translated/ still carries 丙/丁 markers on choices[2] and [3] of q::1; the choices[0,1] of the same question carry ア/イ. Mixed-marker leak. Stage-6/export programmatic fix has already normalized output/ to A/B/C/D so the released artifact is fine — but the canonical translated/ is inconsistent.
translation_findings.recommended_fix: Add a one-shot normalizer pass over translated/page_*.json choices[*].zh and [*].en so the canonical layer is also clean (strip ア-エ/甲-丁/lowercase a-d/A-D leading markers, force-prefix uppercase A./B./C./D.).

translation_findings.jp: ウ. ターゲットとしている市場の伸び / エ. 日本経済の動向
translation_findings.zh: 丙. 目标市场的增长 / 丁. 日本经济的动向
translation_findings.en: C. Growth of the target market / D. Trends in the Japanese economy
translation_findings.issue: EN side of q::1 uses uppercase C./D. while choices[0,1] use lowercase a./b. — within the same question. Inconsistent. Output exporter already normalizes, so released artifact is uniform A-D.
Full 甲乙丙丁 set in zh choices of q::2 — Sinitic ordinal markers introduced where ア-エ should have been mapped directly to A-D. Same root cause; released output already corrected.
q::2 en uses uppercase A-D (correct), but inconsistency across questions on the same page (q::0 uses lowercase a./b./c./d. in en). Programmatic normalization to A-D in translated/ would harmonize.
